sourceMovie.title: Honor Society
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Honor Society works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Honor Society clicked for you, 10 Things I Hate About You (1999) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Honor Society?
faq.answer: Try 10 Things I Hate About You, Pitch Perfect, School of Rock—each shares DNA with Honor Society while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Honor Society?
faq.answer: Honor Society (2022) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Honor Society worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
